We noticed unusual activity on your account and are verifying your personal details to ensure the security of your information and funds. To protect your account, please verify your details by clicking the link below:

[Verify Your Account Details](https://secure.bankwebsite.com/verify-account)

This verification is required to maintain the security of your account and prevent unauthorized access. If you did not request this verification, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at [support@bankwebsite.com] or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX].

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and thank you for being a valued customer at [Bank Name].

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Bank Name]  
[Bank Website URL]  
[Phone Number]  
[Social Media Links (optional)]

---

- Add a "P.S. Your account will be locked if verification is not completed within 48 hours."
- Use a "Report Fraud" button or link for added convenience.
